text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 67 

COMMENT: The valid value list of eligibility groups aligns with those being used in the Medicaid and CHIP Program 
Data System (MACPro). 

ACA Medicaid expansion for childless adults, represented by valid values “72” through “75” are still 
technically characterized as mandatory eligibility groups by Subsection 1902(a)(10)(A)(i) of the Social 
Security Act (SSA)
